'''ngongaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nublike|nublike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nublike|nublike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngongaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngongarithi|ngongarithi]] || [[word:ngongariji|ngongariji]] || [[word:ngongarishi|ngongarishi]] || [[word:ngongariki|ngongariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngongaruthuthu|ngongaruthuthu]] || [[word:ngongarujuju|ngongarujuju]] || [[word:ngongarushushu|ngongarushushu]] || [[word:ngongarukuku|ngongarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngongaruthu|ngongaruthu]] || [[word:ngongaruju|ngongaruju]] || [[word:ngongarushu|ngongarushu]] || [[word:ngongaruku|ngongaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngongarufthuf|ngongarufthuf]] || [[word:ngongarufjuf|ngongarufjuf]] || [[word:ngongarufshuf|ngongarufshuf]] || [[word:ngongarufkuf|ngongarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngongarethe|ngongarethe]] || [[word:ngongareje|ngongareje]] || [[word:ngongareshe|ngongareshe]] || [[word:ngongareke|ngongareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngongarothotho|ngongarothotho]] || [[word:ngongarojojo|ngongarojojo]] || [[word:ngongaroshosho|ngongaroshosho]] || [[word:ngongarokoko|ngongarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngongarotho|ngongarotho]] || [[word:ngongarojo|ngongarojo]] || [[word:ngongarosho|ngongarosho]] || [[word:ngongaroko|ngongaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngongarofthof|ngongarofthof]] || [[word:ngongarofjof|ngongarofjof]] || [[word:ngongarofshof|ngongarofshof]] || [[word:ngongarofkof|ngongarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfthĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfjĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfshĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfkĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfthĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfjĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfshĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfkĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfthĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfjĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfshĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongarĂŻfkĂŻf|ngongarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngongarĂŠthĂŠ|ngongarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngongarĂŠjĂŠ|ngongarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngongarĂŠshĂŠ|ngongarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngongarĂŠkĂŠ|ngongarĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngongarathatha|ngongarathatha]] || [[word:ngongarajaja|ngongarajaja]] || [[word:ngongarashasha|ngongarashasha]] || [[word:ngongarakaka|ngongarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngongaratha|ngongaratha]] || [[word:ngongaraja|ngongaraja]] || [[word:ngongarasha|ngongarasha]] || [[word:ngongaraka|ngongaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngongarafthaf|ngongarafthaf]] || [[word:ngongarafjaf|ngongarafjaf]] || [[word:ngongarafshaf|ngongarafshaf]] || [[word:ngongarafkaf|ngongarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngongarasha|ngongarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngongarshĂ«sha|ngongarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngongarosha|ngongarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngongarmusha|ngongarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngongaryasha|ngongaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongongarnkshĂ«sha|gongongarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongongarnkrosha|gongongarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongongarnkmusha|gongongarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongongarnkyasha|gongongarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngongangarasha|ngongangarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngongangarshĂ«sha|ngongangarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngongangarosha|ngongangarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngongangarmusha|ngongangarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngongangaryasha|ngongangaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongongangarnkshĂ«sha|gongongangarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongongangarnkrosha|gongongangarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongongangarnkmusha|gongongangarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongongangarnkyasha|gongongangarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngengĂŠrasha|ngengĂŠrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngengĂŠrshĂ«sha|ngengĂŠrshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngengĂŠrosha|ngengĂŠrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngengĂŠrmusha|ngengĂŠrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngengĂŠryasha|ngengĂŠryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongengĂŠrnkshĂ«sha|gongengĂŠrnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongengĂŠrnkrosha|gongengĂŠrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongengĂŠrnkmusha|gongengĂŠrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongengĂŠrnkyasha|gongengĂŠrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngongfarasha|ngongfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngongfarshĂ«sha|ngongfarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngongfarosha|ngongfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngongfarmusha|ngongfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngongfaryasha|ngongfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongongfarnkshĂ«sha|gongongfarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongongfarnkrosha|gongongfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongongfarnkmusha|gongongfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongongfarnkyasha|gongongfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
